Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Eugene Chang, Esq, Tel. no. 415-981-0550, for plaintiff and moving party: FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING:
Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is granted. Plaintiff's undertaking is waived. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Issuance Of Writ Of Possession And/Or Tpo
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Eugene Chang, Esq, Tel. no. 415-981-0550, for plaintiff and moving party: FIRST NATIONAL BANK OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING:
Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Issuance Of Writ Of Possession and/or Temporary Restraining Order is granted. Plaintiff's undertaking is waived. Defendant's undertaking is $250,000. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
